name: ecomsec/security-headers
description: Protect your Shopware store with professional HTTP security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy and more.

description.de-DE: Schützen Sie Ihren Shopware-Shop mit professionellen HTTP-Security-Headern: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy und mehr. Einfach konfigurierbar im Admin-Bereich.
description.en-GB: Protect your Shopware store with professional HTTP security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy and more. Easy to configure in the admin panel.
